programme.title: ⭐⭐ 2.6m @ 12s OFFSHORE
programme.desc:
2. 6m and offshore; I've seen worse ways to spend a Tuesday at Ribeira.
🌊 Swell: 2.6m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 18.0km/h NE (OFFSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 40.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.1m
📋 Clean conditions with offshore wind

programme.title: 🌊 2.3m @ 12s CROSS
programme.desc:
2.3m at Supertubos with that wind? Bring a shovel; you'll be digging yourself out of the foam.

programme.desc:

programme.desc:

programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 2.3m @ 12s ONSHORE
programme.desc:

🌊 Swell: 2.3m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 12.0km/h NNW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 22.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m

programme.title: 🌊 2.3m @ 12s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
That 2.3m swell's wrestling onshore winds, making Lagide a washing machine best observed with a bica.
🌊 Swell: 2.3m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 12.0km/h NNW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 22.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m

programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 2.1m @ 12s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
With that onshore wind and 2.1m swell, today's session will mostly involve battling chop and regretting life choices.
🌊 Swell: 2.1m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 16.0km/h N (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 28.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.4m
